creator: tremere@cainites.net
text:
Hello again.

After some digging around in the dependencies of the py27-* ports on my system, only py27-cryptography seems to have a direct link to the OpenSSL libraries. Since the _openssl.so was linked to LibreSSL I've installed it via a package using pkg install. Unfortunately that didn't help at all.

The only thing I noticed is slower startup of letsencrypt-renewal, but the error remains the same.
